function: () => { const v=document.getElementById('app-views'); const t=document.getElementById('app-tab-bar'); const c=document.querySelector('.app-container'); const m=document.querySelector('.mobile-swipe-header'); const con=document.getElementById('connect-card'); return { swiperDefined: typeof Swiper!=='undefined', appViewsPresent: !!v, tabBarPresent: !!t, mobileHeaderPresent: !!m, connectCardPresent: !!con, appViewsDisplay: v?window.getComputedStyle(v).display:'not-found', tabBarDisplay: t?window.getComputedStyle(t).display:'not-found', desktopDisplay: c?window.getComputedStyle(c).display:'not-found', connectCardInMobile: con&&m?m.contains(con):false }; }
